name: Place Your Bets
text: Each player secretly bets 'heads' or 'odd' by hiding a token in a fist. Then flip a coin and roll a six-sided die. Each player who guessed both correctly draws a card. Each player who guessed neither loses 2 life. You, the house, draw a card no matter what.
flavorText: "Bets down! No more bets! ...okay one more bet. No more bets!"
